events.text: order 3201 ka material kab aayega? vendor ne kal bola tha aaj deliver hoga
bhai abhi truck Lahore mein hai. shayad shaam tak
shaam tak matlab 5 baje ya 8 baje? client wait kar raha hai
6 baje tak confirm tha unhone. main dobara call karta hun
production floor pe angle iron khatam ho gaya. order 3201 ruk jayega agar material nahi aaya
truck nikal gaya Lahore se. 4 ghante mein yahan hoga inshallah
truck pohoncha? koi update?
aa gaya bhai. unloading ho rahi hai
order 3310 — cutting complete. welding start ho gayi hai
QC check kab hoga? inspector aaj available hai kal nahi
aaj 2 baje ke baad kar lo
QC done. minor rework required. 3 joints pe
kitna time lagega rework mein?
2-3 ghante. aaj raat tak complete ho jayega
order 3310 rework complete. dispatch ready hai
vendor Hamza Steel ne price revise kiya hai. 15% increase. koi alternative hai?
Al-Kareem Steel se rate mangwata hun
Al-Kareem wale 8% increase kar rahe hain. Hamza se better hai
theek hai. Al-Kareem ko order dete hain order 3340 ke liye
bhai order 3340 ka pipe material wrong gauge aaya hai. 3mm ki jagah 2.5mm
Al-Kareem ko call karo abhi. replacement chahiye
baat ki. kal replacement bhejenge
kal? production ruk jayegi aaj
unhone aaj shaam 5 baje tak dene ka kaha hai. extra charge nahi lagega
material aa gaya. correct gauge. production resume
order 3401 delivery date kya hai? client ka call aaya tha
10 April confirm thi
bhai 10 April mushkil hai. fabrication mein 3 din delay hai. welder beemar tha
kitna realistic date hai?
14 April comfortable hoga
client ko 13 April bolunga. internal target 12 rakhte hain
order 3401 fabrication complete. painting start
painting done. dispatch ready
👍 client ko kal delivery confirm karo
naya order aaya hai. order 3500. client: Fauji Cement. structural steel 45 ton
drawing share karo
[Document: order_3500_drawings_v1.pdf]
drawings dekh li. complex hai. 6 hafta minimum lagega
material procurement start karo. Hamza Steel ko RFQ bhejo aaj hi
order 3500 — material aa gaya. cutting start ho gayi
order 3500 fabrication 60% complete
order 3500 kab complete hoga? Fauji wale pressure de rahe hain
10 July tak complete ho jayega. painting aur dispatch mein 3-4 din aur
15 July ko dispatch confirm karte hain
order 3500 fabrication complete ✅
painting complete. QC inspection kal
QC passed. dispatch ready
truck book ho gaya. kal subah dispatch
order 3500 dispatch ho gaya. tracking number share karta hun
production floor pe welding rods khatam hone wali hain. 2 din ka stock bacha hai
Farhan bhai order karo aaj hi. E6013 — 50 boxes
order de diya. parson delivery hogi
welding rods aa gaye
order 3601 — client ne design change bheja hai. 30% kaam badh jayega
change order raise karo. extra cost aur time dono
main variation order draft karta hun. review kar lena
[Document: variation_order_3601_v1.docx]
reviewed. theek hai. client ko sign karwao
order 3650 — vendor ne material delivery miss ki. koi reason nahi bataya
direct call karo. WhatsApp pe nahi chalta
truck ka tyre puncture hua tha. kal subah delivery confirm ki hai
kal subah matlab kitne baje?
9 baje tak
material aa gaya
bhai kal se gas supply band ho rahi hai SNGPL wali. production pe impact hoga
kitne din ke liye?
3 din bola hai. maintenance work
jo orders urgent hain unhe aaj kal mein prioritize karo. order 3710 aur 3715
samajh gaya. aaj raat shift lagani padegi
gas aa gaya. production normal
sab log — 25 December se 1 January factory band rahegi. Eid Milad aur New Year
orders ka kya? koi pending hai?
order 3801 urgent hai. 24 tak complete karo
order 3801 complete. dispatch ready ✅
dispatch ho gaya. sab ko Eid Milad mubarak 🌙
sab wapas? factory resume kar rahe hain
haan bhai. production floor ready hai
ek welder nahi aaya. phone nahi utha raha
Rashid aa gaya. family issue tha
order 3850 — client ne inspection ke liye apna engineer bheja hai. aaj 3 baje
floor ready kar raha hun
inspection complete. client engineer satisfied. 2 minor points note kiye hain. next week follow up hoga
naya supplier contact kiya hai — Sindh Steel Traders. rates acche hain aur Karachi mein hai
sample order karo pehle. order 3901 ke liye try karte hain
theek hai
Sindh Steel ka material aa gaya. quality check kar raha hun
quality theek hai. certificates bhi sahi hain
accha hai. agle orders mein alternative vendor ke taur pe rakhte hain
order 3950 — drawing mein ek discrepancy hai. column height 2 jagah alag likha hua hai. 6.2m aur 6.5m
client ko aaj hi clarify karo. production band karo is part ki jab tak confirm nahi hota
client se baat ki. 6.2m correct hai. drawing update aayegi kal
👍 production resume
order 4001 ka advance payment nahi aaya abhi tak. production rok ke rakhna chahiye?
accounts se poocho status
accounts bolta hai kal tak aayega. client ne transfer kiya hai
payment aa gayi ✅ production green signal
aaj bijli nahi hai. KESC load shedding 6 ghante ki
generator pe kaam karo. fuel hai?
kal hi fill karwaya tha. 8 ghante chalega
theek hai. critical operations jari rakho
bijli aa gayi
Labour Day — factory band hai. kal wapas
order 4101 urgent. client ne delivery date 2 hafte pehle pull in ki hai
kyun? koi reason?
unka site ready ho gaya pehle. erection start karna chahte hain
possible nahi hai 2 hafte pehle. material abhi procurement mein hai
client ko batao. 1 hafta pehle try kar sakte hain maximum. 2 hafta nahi hoga
client maan gaya. 1 hafta pehle confirm kar liya
order 4200 — Hamza Steel ne bola raw material ki shortage hai market mein. MS plate nahi mil rahi
doosre vendors try karo. Sindh Steel, Al-Kareem dono ko call karo
Al-Kareem ke paas hai. thodi mehngi hai — 12% premium
koi choice nahi. order dedo. client ko delay nahi kar sakte
order 4300 — crane driver nahi aaya. heavy lifting ruki hui hai
reserve driver ka number hai?
usse call kiya. 1 ghante mein aa jayega
crane driver aa gaya. operations resume
order 4400 dispatch plan kya hai? client 10 July maang raha hai
fabrication complete hai. painting 2 din mein hogi. dispatch 9 July tak ho sakta hai
perfect. 9 ko confirm karo
truck book ho gaya. loading shuru
order 4400 dispatch ✅ client ko intimation de dena
order 4500 — client ne 3 mahine baad extra item add karne ki request ki hai. scope creep hai
written mein lena. variation order raise karo formal. verbally nahi
haan bilkul. draft karta hun
naya welder join kar raha hai aaj. Imtiaz bhai. 15 saal ka experience hai
accha hua. Rashid ki retirement ke baad 2 mahine se pressure tha
order 4600 — vendor ne bataya port pe container hold ho gaya hai customs mein. imported plates hain
clearance agent se baat karo. kitna time lagega?
agent bolta hai 3-5 working days. documents sahi hain lekin routine inspection hai
client ko proactively batao. risk hide mat karo
container clear ho gaya. material kal aayega
order 4700 — structural drawing revision 3 aayi hai. revision 2 se kuch changes hain
jo kaam ho chuka hai usmein koi change hai?
nahi. sirf un pieces mein jo abhi start nahi hue
phir theek hai. revision 3 ke mutabiq aage barho
order 4821 ka truck nahi aaya abhi tak. vendor Hamza Steel ne kal 8 AM delivery confirm ki thi
Farhan bhai call karo Hamza Steel ko abhi
truck driver se baat ki. truck subah breakdown ho gaya GT Road pe
kab tak theek hoga?
unhone 4 ghante bola hai. mechanic aa raha hai
production mein order 4821 ka kaam ruk jayega. 2 ghante ka buffer hai bas
truck chal pada. 1.5 ghante mein pohonchega
material aa gaya. production resume kar rahe hain
sab log please note karo — December 20 se January 5 tak winter shutdown. orders accordingly plan karo
order 4900 December 18 tak complete ho jayega. koi issue nahi
order 4910 mein risk hai. painting mein delay hai
painting priority pe lagao. overtime karo agar zaroorat ho
order 4910 complete ✅ dispatch ready hai
dono orders dispatch ho gaye. shutdown se pehle sab clear ✅
👍 sab ko Eid aur New Year mubarak. January 6 ko milte hain
Assalamualaikum. Naya saal mubarak sab ko. chalo shuru karte hain
walaikumsalam. floor ready hai
walaikumsalam. welding team puri aa gayi hai
order 5001 — client ne advance nahi bheja. production start hogi ya nahi?
accounts se confirm karo. policy hai pehle 30% advance
client ne bola wire transfer initiate kar di hai. 2 din mein aayegi
material procurement start karo. advance aayi to production. nahi aayi to rok lena
advance aa gayi ✅
order 5100 — floor pe ek accident ho gaya. chhoti injury hai. Nadeem ka haath cut gaya
Nadeem theek hai?
haan. first aid ho gayi. clinic bhej rahe hain proper dressing ke liye
incident report likho. safety meeting kal subah 8 baje. sab mandatory
Nadeem wapas aaya. 3 stitches. kaam nahi kar sakta aaj
safety meeting — gloves mandatory ab. no exception. kisi ne bhi bina gloves kaam kiya to warning
order 5200 — client ka site visit hai kal. factory mein aana chahte hain progress dekhne
floor clean karo. safety helmets aur vests visible jagah rakho. progress documentation ready karo
theek hai bhai. kal subah tak sab ready hoga
client visit accha raha. khush gaye. kuch minor queries thi jo maine address kar di
order 5350 — Hamza Steel ne phir price revise ki hai. 20% upar
yaar ab primary vendor change karna padega. Sindh Steel ke saath long-term rate fix karo
Sindh Steel se baat karta hun quarterly contract ke liye
Sindh Steel se 6-month contract ho gaya. rates fixed hain. Hamza Steel backup only
👍 accha kiya. predictability chahiye thi
order 5500 — material inspection mein 4 pieces rejected ho gaye. size tolerance se bahar hain
Sindh Steel ko NCR raise karo. replacement aur credit dono
NCR bhej diya. unhone accept kiya. replacement 2 din mein
replacement material aa gaya. quality theek hai
production resume ✅
order 5600 — client ne final payment rok li hai. keh rahe hain 2 punch list items close nahi hue
punch list items kya hain?
[Document: punchlist_5600_final.pdf]
dekha maine. dono items chote hain. 1 din ka kaam hai
aaj hi khatam karo. kal client ko confirm karo. payment atak rahi hai
punch list complete ✅ photos bhej diye client ko
client ne confirm kiya. payment release ho rahi hai
order 5700 — naya order confirm hua. 80 ton structural steel. biggest order this year
mashallah. drawings kab milenge?
is hafte mein client bhejega
capacity check karta hun. 2 orders pehle se chal rahe hain
phir bhi lena hai. overtime karenge agar zaroorat padi. aisa order nahi chodna
